raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the right side of the darker box without colliding with the lighter box; the cup remains clear of the arm path.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is laterally constrained by the right end-effector to prevent sliding while the left arm establishes the main hold."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "darker box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms have clear lateral access to the left and right faces of the darker box; the gap between the two boxes is sufficient to avoid pinching the lighter box; the cup is not in the lift corridor.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely held in a two-hand lateral pinch and lifted slightly off the tabletop, separated from the lighter box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the right side of the darker box without colliding with the lighter box; the cup remains clear of the arm path.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is laterally constrained by the right end-effector to prevent sliding while the left arm establishes the main hold.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms have clear lateral access to the left and right faces of the darker box; the gap between the two boxes is sufficient to avoid pinching the lighter box; the cup is not in the lift corridor.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held in a two-hand lateral pinch and lifted slightly off the tabletop, separated from the lighter box.
